text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Fan Fest has arrived. It's an event
where a variety of panels and contests are held
on campus for the fans who always support the
students.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As for Matikanetannhauser...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Knock it out of the park! Go, Machitan!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna hit a home run! Mun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's been recruited to participate in a baseball
tournament between classes.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
...Tannhauser. I'd just like to confirm, but you do
understand the current situation, correct?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Of course I do! It's bottom of the sixth, we're
down ten runs to zero, and on the brink of having
the game called on a mercy rule!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Not only that, we have two outs.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
So basically, if I can just hit a home run, we're still
in this thing, right?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Well, yes, that may be technically correct, but—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uh, I don't think there's anything else to say,
but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The fate of our class rests on your shoulders,
Tannhauser! Now, get out there and give that ball
a good wallop!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Tannhauser is the seventh batter. Based on what
I've seen so far, she doesn't appear to be
particularly good at baseball.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
However, I don't go easy on any opponent. That's
what it means to be a first-rate pitcher!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Bring it on!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thwack!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: It's... not a home run, but it is a big hit!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And the right fielder missed the catch!
Run, Tannhauser!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Rrraaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser takes off with lightning
speed, crossing first, second, and third base!
She's sprinting towards home!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the right fielder pulls herself together and
sends the ball flying towards home base!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Diiive!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And when the dust settles...

text_block_list.name: Umpire
text_block_list.text: Out!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: What?! No way!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Argh, my fingers were just short of home plate!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Argh! I'm sooorry!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oof. Yeah, that's just like her.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Still, it was rather impressive of her to get a hit
like that under such pressure.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I really liked the baseball tournament. Everyone
showed a lot of guts out there, so it was a lot of
fun to watch.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
And that ending was a Matikanetannhauser
classic. She's so heartwarming, hehe.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Agh, this is sooo embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser's team lost the game, but
the fans still seemed to enjoy it!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Is that...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: A home run?! You've got to be kidding me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's right! I need to run!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I did it!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
That's Tannhauser for you! She's got nerves of
steel!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Do you think they can make a comeback?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Gah! Well played, Tannhauser!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser hits the spectacular home
run she promised and breathes life back into her
team. However...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Aw, we didn't get even one more run after that.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's like I flipped a switch inside of King. Those
fastballs were something else.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Still, that homer in the bottom of the sixth was
wild!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
You really came through clutch when push came
to shove. You were so cool, Tannhauser!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, thanks so much. Those are usually the
times when I mess things up.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: But I'm glad everyone enjoyed the game!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser's team lost in the end, but
the fans still seemed to enjoy it!
